rows.description: Soluta Scholaro Caesarensi.
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms 'Scholaro Caesarensi' from the image. gemini-flash had 'Caesenensi' and gpt-5-mini had 'Scholeni Caesarensi'. Both extractors had minor variations.

rows.description: P d. Clare of Abee Hill Fine
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description and pence value '3'. gpt-5-mini had '6' for pence and misread parts of the description ('Plece of Ches').
rows.english_description: Payment of the Fine from Clare of Abbey Hill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Fine from Clare of Abbey Hill, amounting to £0 17s 3d.

rows.description: — Longwittenham Fine
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's pence value '6' and the leading dash in the description. gpt-5-mini had '0' for pence and omitted the dash.
rows.english_description: Payment of the Fine from Long Wittenham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Fine from Long Wittenham, amounting to £7 10s 6d.

rows.description: — Minching Fine
rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors. Description from gemini-flash includes the leading dash as seen in the image.
rows.english_description: Payment of the Fine from Minching.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Fine from Minching, amounting to £0 7s 0d.

rows.description: — Sodes Fine
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Visual inspection confirms '— Sodes Fine' from gemini-flash, including the leading dash and the name 'Sodes' (gpt-5-mini read 'Loders').
rows.english_description: Payment of the Fine from Sodes.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Fine from Sodes, amounting to £1 5s 0d.

rows.description: — Judges Fine
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Description from gemini-flash includes the leading dash as seen in the image.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Judges Fine, amounting to £0 5s 10d.

rows.description: Mags Upton Decrant Fest. Nat: 1762
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's row_type ('entry'), description ('Mags Upton Decrant Fest. Nat: 1762'), and pence value ('5'). gpt-5-mini misidentified row_type as 'total', misread parts of the description, and had '6' for pence. The fraction is clear in the image for both.
rows.english_description: Payment to Master Upton for a decree at the Christmas feast of 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Master Upton for a decree at the Christmas feast of 1762, amounting to £23 14s 5¼d.

rows.description: Soluta varia.
rows.notes: Full consensus across all fields for this header row.

rows.description: 1762. Decbray. P d. y. Cook the Several articles among y. soluta Ordinaria Belonging to last years Payments
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description (including '1762. Decbray. P d. y.') and amount_pounds '50'. gpt-5-mini misread amount_pounds as '5' and parts of the description.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Cook for various items included in last year's ordinary payments in December 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Cook for various items included in last year's ordinary payments in December 1762, amounting to £50 19s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the scavengers for last year's bill, amounting to £0 18s 0d.
